CVE-2015-8011.title: Buffer overflow in the lldp_decode function in daemon/protocols/l ...
CVE-2015-8011.summary: Buffer overflow in the lldp_decode function in daemon/protocols/lldp.c in lldpd before 0.8.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (daemon crash) and possibly execute arbitrary code via vectors involving large management addresses and TLV boundaries.

CVE-2019-25076.title: The TSS (Tuple Space Search) algorithm in Open vSwitch 2.x throug ...
CVE-2019-25076.summary: The TSS (Tuple Space Search) algorithm in Open vSwitch 2.x through 2.17.2 and 3.0.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (delays of legitimate traffic) via crafted packet data that requires excessive evaluation time within the packet classification algorithm for the MegaFlow cache, aka a Tuple Space Explosion (TSE) attack.

CVE-2020-27827.title: A flaw was found in multiple versions of OpenvSwitch. Specially c ...
CVE-2020-27827.summary: A flaw was found in multiple versions of OpenvSwitch. Specially crafted LLDP packets can cause memory to be lost when allocating data to handle specific optional TLVs, potentially causing a denial of service. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to system availability.

CVE-2020-35498.title: A vulnerability was found in openvswitch. A limitation in the imp ...
CVE-2020-35498.summary: A vulnerability was found in openvswitch. A limitation in the implementation of userspace packet parsing can allow a malicious user to send a specially crafted packet causing the resulting megaflow in the kernel to be too wide, potentially causing a denial of service. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to system availability.

CVE-2021-36980.title: Open vSwitch (aka openvswitch) 2.11.0 through 2.15.0 has a use-af ...
CVE-2021-36980.summary: Open vSwitch (aka openvswitch) 2.11.0 through 2.15.0 has a use-after-free in decode_NXAST_RAW_ENCAP (called from ofpact_decode and ofpacts_decode) during the decoding of a RAW_ENCAP action.

CVE-2021-3905.title: A memory leak was found in Open vSwitch (OVS) during userspace IP ...
CVE-2021-3905.summary: A memory leak was found in Open vSwitch (OVS) during userspace IP fragmentation processing. An attacker could use this flaw to potentially exhaust available memory by keeping sending packet fragments.

CVE-2022-32166.title: In ovs versions v0.90.0 through v2.5.0 are vulnerable to heap buf ...
CVE-2022-32166.summary: In ovs versions v0.90.0 through v2.5.0 are vulnerable to heap buffer over-read in flow.c. An unsafe comparison of “minimasks” function could lead access to an unmapped region of memory. This vulnerability is capable of crashing the software, memory modification, and possible remote execution.

CVE-2022-4337.title: An out-of-bounds read in Organization Specific TLV was found in v ...
CVE-2022-4337.summary: An out-of-bounds read in Organization Specific TLV was found in various versions of OpenvSwitch.

CVE-2022-4338.title: An integer underflow in Organization Specific TLV was found in va ...
CVE-2022-4338.summary: An integer underflow in Organization Specific TLV was found in various versions of OpenvSwitch.

CVE-2023-1668.title: A flaw was found in openvswitch (OVS). When processing an IP pack ...
CVE-2023-1668.summary: A flaw was found in openvswitch (OVS). When processing an IP packet with protocol 0, OVS will install the datapath flow without the action modifying the IP header. This issue results (for both kernel and userspace datapath) in installing a datapath flow matching all IP protocols (nw_proto is wildcarded) for this flow, but with an incorrect action, possibly causing incorrect handling of other IP packets with a != 0 IP protocol that matches this dp flow.

CVE-2023-3966.title: A flaw was found in Open vSwitch where multiple versions are vuln ...
CVE-2023-3966.summary: A flaw was found in Open vSwitch where multiple versions are vulnerable to crafted Geneve packets, which may result in a denial of service and invalid memory accesses. Triggering this issue requires that hardware offloading via the netlink path is enabled.

CVE-2023-5366.title: A flaw was found in Open vSwitch that allows ICMPv6 Neighbor Adve ...
CVE-2023-5366.summary: A flaw was found in Open vSwitch that allows ICMPv6 Neighbor Advertisement packets between virtual machines to bypass OpenFlow rules. This issue may allow a local attacker to create specially crafted packets with a modified or spoofed target IP address field that can redirect ICMPv6 traffic to arbitrary IP addresses.

CVE-2024-22563.title: openvswitch 2.17.8 was discovered to contain a memory leak via th ...
CVE-2024-22563.summary: openvswitch 2.17.8 was discovered to contain a memory leak via the function xmalloc__ in openvswitch-2.17.8/lib/util.c.
